candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A line shown as a separate same-level expense above EBIT, not indented under or obviously embedded within the selected COGS reference row 'Operating expenses'. It is also a summary row above the more granular depreciation/amortization component rows, so it is preferred to avoid double counting.
Component of the summary row 'Depreciation and amortisation'; not preferred when the summary row is present because using both would double count.
Granular component of total D&A and therefore inferior to the summary row for separate add-back purposes.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Licenses, Copyrights, Property Rights & Designs
candidates.why: Granular amortization component that appears to roll into the summary D&A row; avoid if the summary row is selected.

variables.notes: OK. The selected COGS reference bucket is 'Operating expenses', which appears to be a separate operating expense line rather than a parent total containing the later D&A row. Because explicit D&A is presented separately at the same operating level and a summary row exists, add only 'Depreciation and amortisation'.

candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A row exists, but it is not labelled as SG&A/G&A-specific and sits separately from 'General and administrative costs'. It looks like a broader operating D&A line rather than a sub-bucket that should be added to G&A.
Component of the broader D&A summary and not specifically tied to SG&A/G&A.
Granular component of D&A with no clear SG&A/G&A attribution in the excerpt.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Licenses, Copyrights, Property Rights & Designs
candidates.why: Granular amortization component with no explicit SG&A/G&A attribution; inferior to the summary row and not clearly part of the selected G&A bucket.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA reference bucket is only 'General and administrative costs'. No D&A row is explicitly labelled as belonging to G&A/SG&A, and the visible D&A line appears to be a separate broader operating expense line rather than SG&A-specific D&A to add to the selected G&A bucket. Conservative no-add choice avoids misallocating broad operating D&A into SG&A.
